observations.observation: The WAYFINDING-MAP image is informative in the surrounding arrival content and has no alt attribute; a person must determine the appropriate text alternative.
observations.report_rationale: The image purpose and appropriate text alternative require human confirmation.

observations.observation: The SESSION-DETAILS-CONTROL element is focusable, while the installed script registers only a click handler; keyboard behavior needs human interaction testing.
observations.report_rationale: Keyboard operation requires human interaction testing.

observations.observation: SUPPORT-PREFERENCES-GROUP is presented as one visual group; its programmatic relationship needs inspection with browser accessibility information.
observations.report_rationale: The programmatic relationship requires browser accessibility inspection.
